title: Crispy Irish Bitter Biscuits
description: A sweet and savory biscuit recipe that combines the crunch of Irish ingredients with a hint of pistachio and a bitter twist.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour and pistachio meal.
Add the Irish butter and mix until a dough forms.
Fold in the bitter chocolate chips and crispy fried onions.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5 minutes.
Roll the dough out to 1/4 inch thickness and cut into shapes.
Place the biscuits on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the biscuits from the oven and let cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes.
